# The Valley Clean Team

> Veteran-owned and women-owned professional house and commercial cleaning company serving Huntsville, Athens, Florence & the Shoals, and Mountain Brook in Alabama, plus Nashville, Tennessee. Non-toxic, pet-safe products. Insured, bonded, and background-checked. Flat, published pricing. 5.0 rating from 146 reviews.

Contact: hello@thevalleycleanteam.com — Alabama (256) 826-1100 — Tennessee (615) 510-1427
Book or get a free quote in about 60 seconds.

## Start Here
- [Get a Free Quote](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/get-quote): Flat-rate quote by square footage in ~60 seconds.
- [Book Online](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/booking): Schedule a cleaning online.
- [Pricing](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/pricing): Published flat rates — recurring, deep, and move-out cleaning.
- [About](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/about): Veteran-owned, husband-and-wife founders Todd & Christen Frederickson.

## Best-of & Comparisons (high-intent answers)

- [Best Cleaning Company in Athens, AL (2026)](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/best-cleaning-company-athens-al): Honest comparison of the top cleaning services in Athens.
- [Best Cleaning Company in Florence & the Shoals, AL (2026)](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/best-cleaning-company-florence-al): Honest comparison of the top cleaning services in Florence, Muscle Shoals, Tuscumbia & Sheffield.
- [Best Cleaning Company in Mountain Brook, AL (2026)](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/best-cleaning-company-mountain-brook-al): Honest comparison of the top cleaning services in Mountain Brook & Birmingham.
- [MaidPro vs The Valley Clean Team](https://thevalleycleanteam.com/blog/maidpro-vs-the-valley-clean-team-huntsville): Side-by-side comparison including where each one wins.
